name: UniqueGiftBackdropColors
description: This object describes the colors of the backdrop of a unique gift.

fields.name: center_color
fields.description: The color in the center of the backdrop in RGB format

fields.name: edge_color
fields.description: The color on the edges of the backdrop in RGB format

fields.name: symbol_color
fields.description: The color to be applied to the symbol in RGB format

fields.name: text_color
fields.description: The color for the text on the backdrop in RGB format
